reviews.review_title: Scariest Vr game I’ve ever played
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. The amount of levels is crazy and don’t even start about how scary this game is. Me and my friends played this and talked about how cool the map was in the lobby. Then we decided we were going to try to get to the subway. Let’s just say we went into the green bathroom (which is entirely safe) and we were so scared. We didn’t even make it to a different level. But we saw the red bathroom hallway and it was horrifying. The music is also insane. My only criticism is a bit better models for the monsters but still it’s a great game. Overall this game is amazing and you should definitely get it and play.

This is one of the best scary Beckhams games I’ve ever played. I’ve been looking for a game just like this. It’s very terrifying. There’s so many maps playing. It’s like a maze so many entrances and  exits It’s so fun to play with my friends. The music is amazing. The one downfall about it is it’s a little glitchy and that’s all it’s a very well game. I love it my friends love it 10 out of 10 game if you like scary games.

reviews.review_title: This has been good since the start
reviews.review_description: Unlike other VR games that update with updates that just suck, This game makes sure not to ruin that. Everything has the same vibe with actual fun updates, I have a first 100,000 players badge and it’s still amazing

Liminality is a fun game and my sister Hayzel Shaw told me about it and I figured out how cool liminality is and I hope it has a lot of updates and a little bit more levels and this is a beautiful I play for an hour and it is a fun beautiful cool game and I love to have more updates on this game

reviews.review_title: Kinda mad they got rid of enraged mode
reviews.review_description: I loved the new mode where the text "KILL THEM" flew across your screen as you were chasing them, But they got rid of it :/ as well as making the map free for some reason, Some arcade machines got removed. Like at least add rage mode back, But like give a death animation whenever you kill them or ragdoll physics for something

Keep up the good work!

I can barely walk, cant type without pressing 5 other letters, cant get into a server, and a bunch of other noticeable  bugs. Please fix your game.



Dev note response: I made this review Sep 19 2024 and what I can recall is there being a keyboard that felt impossible to type with as I’d accidentally press multiple keys at once, therefore “cant type without pressing 5 other letters”.
Hppefully the things I wrote in this year old review are now fixed

reviews.review_title: Best game ive ever played in my life 11*
reviews.review_description: One of the BEST VR games I’ve played. The 1.07GB download is absolutely worth every bit of storage. The game is genuinely scary and keeps you on edge the whole time. The different levels make it even better because there’s always something new to experience. If you like horror in VR, this is definitely a game you should try.
Nuff said

This game has been one of the best gt fan games i have ever played
Like kindsty (the owners name) made this game almost a YEAR ago and a lot has happened in this astounding game
And the fact it has been revamped 3 times just goes to show how far kindsty has made this game come
And there is a total of 146 levels in the game (V1-V4)
But my favourite might be Basement V2 or 9223372036854775804 V2 (Yes thats an actual level in the game)
So W to liminality because this game is just amazing
